name: Recipe 1 — Basic cross-tx yield + resume (synthetic)
comment: The simplest NEP-519 mechanic. tx1 calls recipe_basic_yield and persists the YieldId; tx2 calls recipe_basic_resume with a payload; the yielded callback fires with the payload and resolves ok. One actor (recipes contract) + one caller. Step id "b1" names the single yielded promise; no prefix collision with timeout/chained because each scene runs in its own TimelinePlayer instance.

events.title: Recipe 1 — basic cross-tx yield + resume
events.body: the simplest NEP-519 mechanic. tx1 yields a promise; tx2 resumes it with a payload; the callback fires and resolves ok.

events.title: tx1 — recipe_basic_yield(name)
events.body: the contract calls Promise::new_yield("on_basic_resumed"), stores the YieldId under "basic:<name>" in its state, and returns. No resume yet — the yielded callback is scheduled and waiting.

events.title: tx2 — recipe_basic_resume(name, payload)
events.body: the resume looks up the YieldId, calls yield_id.resume(BasicSignal{payload}). The already-scheduled callback receipt fires with the payload as its callback-result.

events.title: resolved
events.body: callback fired exactly once; trace event recipe_resolved_ok carries the resumed payload.
